core_layer_issues: CRITICAL: No ARB/localization files exist (0 *.arb files found)
CRITICAL: flutter_localizations and intl packages not installed in pubspec.yaml
CRITICAL: No Semantics widgets across entire app (zero accessibility)
CRITICAL: permission_handler package not installed
CRITICAL: Zero feature tests - 13 test files only cover core infrastructure (api_client, connectivity, security, optimizer, preloader, startup, profiler, monitor, analyzer, tracker, validators)
HIGH: app_links/uni_links packages not installed - no native deep link intent filters configured
HIGH: SettingsScreen uses Navigator.push instead of GoRouter for child screens (EditProfile, sub-pages)
HIGH: SentryConfig.configure() called inside apiClientProvider Provider - architectural misuse
HIGH: Hardcoded `useMockAuth = true` in auth_provider.dart
HIGH: Hardcoded `'mock-device-uuid-999'` in otp_screen.dart
MEDIUM: No runZonedGuarded in main() for global async error catch-all
MEDIUM: 200+ ad-hoc debugPrint() calls - no structured logging service
MEDIUM: Route transitions all pop without animation
MEDIUM: No EmptyState widgets for HomeScreen and LeaderboardScreen when data is empty (though error/loading handled)
MEDIUM: OfflineBanner only at app level - no per-screen offline awareness
MEDIUM: No device_info_plus package for anti-fraud device fingerprinting
MEDIUM: No app_links package for native deep linking
LOW: No code generation - all 30+ models hand-written with manual JSON parsing (no freezed/json_serializable)
LOW: UpdateService returns hardcoded version data - no API call to check actual app version
LOW: `dart:io Platform` used directly in api_config.dart (not web-safe, though web not a target)
summary.overall_assessment: All 82 screens exist with full implementations across all 24 feature modules. 10 wallet screens, 11 contest screens, 11 admin screens, 9 legal screens - all fully built with Riverpod state management, proper loading/error states, and GoRouter routes. The core layer (security, performance, networking, theme, widgets) is production-ready. However, critical production gaps exist: NO localization (0 ARB files, no intl/flutter_localizations), NO accessibility (zero Semantics), NO permission handling, and NO feature tests. The repository/API-service layer is inconsistent - only 5 of 24 features have dedicated repositories. The app is functionally complete but needs ~22 days of hardening for production readiness.

localization.detail: No flutter_localizations, no intl package, no ARB files, all strings hardcoded in English. LanguageScreen exists but does not actually switch locale. 7 Indian languages planned per STATUS.md.

accessibility.detail: Zero Semantics widgets across all 200+ Dart files. No screen reader support, no accessibility feature detection.

permissions.detail: No permission_handler package. image_picker used without runtime checks. Will crash on Android 13+.

testing.detail: 13 test files exist in test/core/ covering infrastructure only. Zero tests for any feature (auth, contests, wallet, feed, etc.). No widget tests, no integration tests for features.

repository_layer.detail: Only 5/24 features have dedicated repositories: leaderboard, chat, polls, gamification, admin. All others have providers directly using Dio.

model_validation.detail: All 30+ models use manual fromJson with nullable casts and no validation. Using as String?/as int? without try/catch at field level. No freezed/json_serializable codegen.

offline_per_screen.detail: OfflineBanner exists at app level only. 0/18 audited screens adapt UI for offline state per STATUS.md.
